_comment: Action / superhero / blockbuster MOVIE clips niche. NOT music biopics.
topic_filter: Action movies, superhero films (Marvel, DC), blockbuster franchises (Mission Impossible, John Wick, Fast Furious, James Bond), epic fight scenes, big-budget action sequences. EXCLUDE: music biopics, documentaries about musicians, celebrity interviews unrelated to action movies, romance films, comedies without action.

limits._comment: Same per-channel quota as ai_business — 1 video/day -> 6 clips -> 3 posts/day after throttling.
